---
title: "Projects"
---

## Repositories

Add short descriptions and links for each project here.

### Example Project

- Repository: [GSEA Permutation vs. Rotation](https://github.com/mirramockakid/GSEA-Permutation-vs.-Rotation)
- Summary: One or two lines describing the project.
- Outputs:
  - [Analysis HTML](https://mirramockakid.github.io/GSEA-Permutation-vs.-Rotation/rotations_walkthrough.html)
